note: 2026-06-02 EVENING re-audit (46 completed, 97.8%, window 16:51-19:34Z) — third 06-02 window. KEY: copilot-sdk session.idle 600s timeout ESCALATED from experimental branches to a PRODUCTION schedule/main workflow (Daily Security Observability Report, the window's ONLY failure). POSITIVES: safe-output partial-failure class did NOT recur; token-budget-429 did NOT recur; legacy copilot CLI path 0/34 failures. sdk-driver path now on ~14/48 copilot+codex runs. Prior note (AFTERNOON): 2026-06-02 AFTERNOON re-audit (47 completed, 89.4%, window 14:31-17:23Z) complementing the morning audit #36398. POSITIVE: token-budget-429 did NOT recur this window (top eff_tok 23.79M < 25M cap). safe-output partial-failure-intolerance persists (CLI Consistency Checker count-exceeded variant). TWO NEW classes: runner-infra-node-missing (exit 127, Daily Issues Report Generator) and agent-timeout-no-output (Avenger opus, 48min). copilot-sdk experimental class recurred as a session.idle TIMEOUT variant (PR Code Quality Reviewer on ab-advisor branch).

issues.title: WATCH this window: token-budget-429 did NOT recur in the 06-02 afternoon window (top eff_tok 23.79M < 25M cap, SUCCESS). Stays OPEN #35661 — morning window had 2 over-cap; remains intermittent.
issues.detail: 06-02 afternoon (14:31-17:23Z): NO 429 / no isMaxEffectiveTokensExceededError=true. Heaviest run UK AI Operational Resilience 23.79M succeeded under the 25M cap. This is the SECOND window-level reprieve (06-01 was also quiet) but the morning 06-02 window had 2 over-cap failures (Daily Firewall Logs 25.67M, Smoke Copilot 25.50M), so the cap stays intermittently hit by heavy daily-aggregation workflows. Maps to open #35661. FIX unchanged: (1) scope/chunk heavy daily-aggregation workflows; (2) harness FAIL-FAST on the maxEffectiveTokensExceeded signature instead of 5 retries.

issues.title: Did NOT recur in the 06-02 EVENING window (16:51-19:34Z, 0 safe-output failures). Stays OPEN/HIGH — still the dominant class across recent windows; fix unchanged. Prior afternoon: CLI Consistency Checker over-emitted a CAPPED type (3x create_issue, max 1), red-failing the AGENT step despite the 1 allowed issue landing.
issues.detail: Root defect family unchanged: a safe-output validation problem red-fails the run even though useful output landed. 06-02 afternoon variant: CLI Consistency Checker 26826617790 (copilot) emitted 3x create_issue but the type cap is 1 -> 2 'Too many items of type create_issue. Maximum allowed: 1' validation errors -> AGENT step exit 1 -> run failure, while the safe_outputs job SUCCEEDED and created the 1 allowed issue. Variants now span target=*, target=triggering, no-issue-number, transient ERR_API, AND count-exceeded. FIX (High): (1) when a capped type is over-emitted, KEEP the first N allowed items and emit a WARNING instead of failing the agent step; (2) make Process Safe Outputs treat individual failed/over-limit items as skipped-with-warning when >=1 item succeeded; (3) validate target/context at the MCP emit boundary so the agent self-corrects in-loop.

issues.title: ESCALATED to HIGH (06-02 evening): copilot-sdk 'Timeout after 600000ms waiting for session.idle' now hit a PRODUCTION schedule/main workflow — Daily Security Observability Report 26836111514 (the evening window's ONLY failure). No longer experimental-branch-only.
issues.detail: 4 workflow_dispatch runs (26792092514, 26793757607, 26795908399, 26797319253) on experimental feature branch copilot/fix-copilot-sdk-integration all failed at the agent step with T0: copilot-sdk headless server starts (port 3002), sdk-driver connects + creates a session, then on 'sending prompt' throws uncaught 'Error: Execution failed: Error: Session was not created with authentication info or custom provider' and exits 1. This is an in-development experimental Copilot SDK integration being iterated via repeated manual dispatch (4 distinct SHAs over ~3h), NOT a production-workflow regression. Watch-only: confirm the fix lands and the SDK session is created WITH auth info / a custom provider before this graduates from smoke. The headless server warns 'No COPILOT_CONNECTION_TOKEN was set' — likely the missing auth-info path. | 06-02 afternoon: PR Code Quality Reviewer 26827796547 on branch copilot/ab-advisor-experiment-campaign-max-turns hit a NEW failure mode in the same experimental copilot-sdk family: sdk-driver 'Timeout after 600000ms waiting for session.idle' (10m hard), no output, not retried. Still experimental dev-iteration (ab-advisor max-turns campaign), not a production regression. Watch-only. | 06-02 EVENING ESCALATION: the SAME session.idle 600s timeout signature now hit a PRODUCTION scheduled workflow on main — Daily Security Observability Report 26836111514 (copilot, claude-sonnet-4.6). sdk-driver created the session, custom provider resolved WITH auth (provider=copilot baseUrl=api-proxy:10002), prompt sent, then 'Timeout after 600000ms waiting for session.idle', hasOutput=false, attempt-1 not retried (no-output rule), exit 1, 10m1s. NOT firewall-caused (only 1 trivial block patch-diff.githubusercontent.com). The copilot-sdk/sdk-driver path is now progressively rolled out to ~14/48 copilot+codex runs (~13 genuine prod copilot wfs this window: Daily SPDD Spec Planner, Daily Secrets Analysis, Daily Testify, GEO Optimizer, Linter Miner, PR Code Quality Reviewer x5, PR Triage, Daily Repository Chronicle, + the failing Security Observability Report). 1/~13 prod sdk runs hung => intermittent ~7% sdk-path hang; legacy copilot CLI path 0/34. FIX (High): (1) on the session.idle wait, after the 600s hard timeout RETRY at least once (the no-output non-retry rule is wrong for a session.idle hang — the session WAS created and the prompt WAS sent, so it is not a startup crash); (2) investigate why the headless Copilot server never emits session.idle for some prompts (possible long tool-loop or a lost SDK event); (3) until the sdk-driver session lifecycle is stable, consider keeping heavy/long production workflows on the legacy copilot path or lowering the rollout percentage.

issues.title: NEW (infra): Daily Issues Report Generator failed agent step with exit 127 — 'node runtime missing on this runner'
issues.detail: Daily Issues Report Generator 26831132205 (copilot, schedule/main): agent step exit 127. The copilot_harness guard fired: 'node runtime missing on this runner — check runtimes.node in workflow YAML; exit 127'. The runner lacked a usable node binary (GH_AW_NODE_BIN unset/non-exec and `command -v node` empty). Pre-agent INFRA failure, not agent logic. Watch for recurrence — if it repeats, the workflow's runtimes.node setup or runner image is the culprit. Single occurrence this window.

issues.title: NEW: Avenger (claude/opus) ran 48.4min then failed with turns=0 / empty output — agent-step time-limit while still working
issues.detail: Avenger 26831111185 (claude, opus-4-8, schedule/main): agent job ran 15:47:48->16:36:13Z (48.4min) actively making opus /v1/messages calls and dispatching Bash + TaskOutput tools, then failed with run.Turns=0, ErrorCount=0, agent_output items:[]. Hit the agent step time limit (or a stuck long-running TaskOutput/Bash) without ever emitting a safe output. Watch: if Avenger recurs at ~48min, cap its turns/time or investigate a blocking TaskOutput poll. Single occurrence.
